coreLesson: Trade O(n) space for O(1) lookup time.

problems.title: Contains Duplicate
problems.teaches: Have I seen this? → HashSet exists for this

problems.title: Two Sum
problems.teaches: Find the complement → HashMap maps value → index

problems.title: Ransom Note
problems.teaches: Two frequency maps, compare counts — HashMap as counter

problems.title: Group Anagrams
problems.teaches: Keys can be computed (sorted string) — not just raw values

problems.title: Top K Frequent Elements
problems.teaches: Frequency counting + selection — map as counter, then sort by value

problems.title: Longest Consecutive Sequence
problems.teaches: HashSet for O(1) existence check + only start from sequence roots

coreLesson: Two coordinated pointers on sorted/structured arrays solve in O(n) what brute force does in O(n²).

problems.title: Squaring a Sorted Array
problems.teaches: Simplest TP: converge from both ends, largest absolute value is at one end

problems.title: Pair with Target Sum (Two Sum II)
problems.teaches: Sum comparison drives pointer movement — sum too big → right in, too small → left out

problems.title: Remove Duplicates from Sorted Array
problems.teaches: Slow/fast pointer: slow tracks write position, fast scans ahead

problems.title: Sort Colors (Dutch National Flag)
problems.teaches: Three-pointer partition — a mid pointer added to the left/right model

problems.title: 3Sum
problems.teaches: Outer loop fixes one element, TP solves the remaining two — reduces 3-variable to 2

problems.title: 3Sum Closest
problems.teaches: Same as Q5 but track minimum difference — goal changes, structure doesn't

problems.title: Container With Most Water
problems.teaches: Which pointer to move: always the shorter wall — the constraining side insight

problems.title: Comparing Strings with Backspaces
problems.teaches: Two pointers on two different strings simultaneously — extends to multi-sequence TP

problems.title: Minimum Window Sort
problems.teaches: Find the unsorted window by moving from both ends — synthesis of all above

coreLesson: Maintain a window invariant — expand right freely, shrink left conditionally.

problems.title: Maximum Sum Subarray of Size K
problems.teaches: Fixed window: just slide, no shrink logic needed

problems.title: Minimum Size Subarray Sum
problems.teaches: Variable window: shrink when sum ≥ target (window is too big)

problems.title: Longest Substring with K Distinct Characters
problems.teaches: Variable window: shrink when distinct count > K (window is invalid)

problems.title: Fruits into Baskets
problems.teaches: Same as Q3 with K=2 — different framing, identical pattern. Confirms you understood Q3.

problems.title: Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
problems.teaches: Shrink when a duplicate appears — invalid window, not just oversized

problems.title: Longest Repeating Character Replacement
problems.teaches: Shrink based on (window_size - max_freq > k) — derived condition, not a direct check

problems.title: Max Consecutive Ones III
problems.teaches: At most K zeros allowed — same structure as Q6, different invariant

problems.title: Permutation in String
problems.teaches: Fixed window + frequency map — combines Q1 (fixed) + Q5 (freq tracking)

problems.title: Minimum Window Substring
problems.teaches: Two-constraint variable window — hardest: shrink when both constraints satisfied

coreLesson: At each position, decide: extend the current subarray or restart from here?

problems.title: Maximum Subarray Sum
problems.teaches: Classic Kadane: dp[i] = max(nums[i], dp[i-1] + nums[i])

problems.title: Minimum Subarray Sum
problems.teaches: Same logic, flip max to min — tests if you understood Q1 or just memorized it

problems.title: Maximum Product Subarray
problems.teaches: Product can flip sign → must track both current max AND current min simultaneously

problems.title: Maximum Sum Circular Subarray
problems.teaches: Either normal Kadane OR wrap-around = total_sum - min_subarray. Two-case reasoning.

problems.title: Maximum Subarray Sum with One Deletion
problems.teaches: Two states at each position: deleted once and not deleted yet — first taste of multi-state DP

coreLesson: Precompute cumulative sums once, answer range queries in O(1).

problems.title: Find Pivot Index
problems.teaches: Direct prefix sum: left_sum = prefix[i], right_sum = total - prefix[i+1]

problems.title: Subarray Sum Equals K
problems.teaches: prefix[i] - prefix[j] = k → store prefix sums in HashMap to count subarrays

problems.title: Subarray Sums Divisible by K
problems.teaches: Same as Q2 but with remainder as key — (prefix % k + k) % k handles negatives

problems.title: Contiguous Array
problems.teaches: Map 0→-1, then find longest subarray with sum=0 — Q2 pattern with transformed input

problems.title: Shortest Subarray with Sum at Least K
problems.teaches: Prefix sum + monotonic deque — bridges into Stack territory for pruning

coreLesson: Two pointers moving at different speeds detect cycles and find structural midpoints.

problems.title: Middle of the LinkedList
problems.teaches: Fast moves 2, slow moves 1 — when fast reaches end, slow is at middle

problems.title: LinkedList Cycle
problems.teaches: If a cycle exists, fast will lap slow and they'll meet inside it

problems.title: Start of LinkedList Cycle
problems.teaches: Floyd's part 2: after meeting, pointers from head and meeting point converge at cycle start

problems.title: Happy Number
problems.teaches: Is this a cycle? on a non-list context — the mental model transfers to abstract sequences

problems.title: Find the Duplicate Number
problems.teaches: Treat array as a linked list (index → value), apply Floyd's — biggest insight leap here

problems.title: Palindrome LinkedList
problems.teaches: Find middle (Q1) + reverse second half + compare both halves

problems.title: Reorder List
problems.teaches: Find middle (Q1) + reverse second half (Q6 technique) + interleave both halves

coreLesson: LIFO structure for deferred decisions; monotonic stack for next greater/smaller problems.

problems.title: Valid Parentheses
problems.teaches: Push open brackets, check against top on close — simplest LIFO application

problems.title: Remove Adjacent Duplicates
problems.teaches: Stack as running state: push, pop when top equals current

problems.title: Remove All Adjacent Duplicates II
problems.teaches: Stack needs to track (character, count) pairs — state per element, not just element

problems.title: Daily Temperatures
problems.teaches: Monotonic decreasing stack: pop when you find the answer for a waiting element

problems.title: Next Greater Element II
problems.teaches: Q4 on a circular array — loop twice, mod-index trick

problems.title: Remove K Digits
problems.teaches: Monotonic increasing stack for optimization: pop larger digits greedily

problems.title: Simplify Path
problems.teaches: Stack as path processor — different domain, same push/pop reasoning

coreLesson: Any problem with a monotonic predicate (is X valid?) can halve its search space.

problems.title: Binary Search
problems.teaches: The mechanism: lo, hi, mid = (lo+hi)//2, adjust bounds

problems.title: First and Last Position
problems.teaches: Two BS calls with different find-leftmost / find-rightmost conditions

problems.title: Peak Index in Mountain Array
problems.teaches: BS where condition is direction: nums[mid] < nums[mid+1] means go right

problems.title: Find Minimum in Rotated Sorted Array
problems.teaches: Which half is sorted? — one half always is, binary decision on that

problems.title: Search in Rotated Sorted Array
problems.teaches: Q4 logic + now also find the target — two conditions combined

problems.title: Koko Eating Bananas
problems.teaches: The big leap — binary search on the answer space, not the array itself

problems.title: Capacity to Ship Packages in D Days
problems.teaches: Reinforces Q6: same BS on answer with different feasibility check

problems.title: Aggressive Cows
problems.teaches: Maximize the minimum — BS on answer space + greedy feasibility

problems.title: Split Array Largest Sum
problems.teaches: Minimize the maximum — same family, harder feasibility check

problems.title: Search a 2D Matrix
problems.teaches: Treat 2D as 1D with row = mid // cols, col = mid % cols

problems.title: Median of Two Sorted Arrays
problems.teaches: BS on partition position — hardest; tests full command of the concept

coreLesson: DFS = recurse on children (return info up or pass constraints down). BFS = process level by level with a queue.

problems.title: Invert Binary Tree
problems.teaches: Simplest DFS: base case + swap children. Establishes the recursive template.

problems.title: Maximum Depth of Binary Tree
problems.teaches: DFS returning a value UP the stack: 1 + max(left, right)

problems.title: Symmetric Tree
problems.teaches: DFS comparing two subtrees simultaneously — parallel recursion

problems.title: Same Tree
problems.teaches: Q3 logic on two separate trees — slight variation, builds confidence

problems.title: Subtree of Another Tree
problems.teaches: Combines Q4 (same tree check) with full tree traversal — composition

problems.title: Binary Tree Level Order Traversal
problems.teaches: BFS with deque — teaches when to use BFS (need level structure)

problems.title: Binary Tree Right Side View
problems.teaches: BFS variation: take last node per level — one-line change, different insight

problems.title: Validate Binary Search Tree
problems.teaches: DFS with bounds passed DOWN: (min_val, max_val) constraining each node

problems.title: Kth Smallest Element in BST
problems.teaches: Inorder traversal gives sorted order — BST property exploited

problems.title: Path Sum II
problems.teaches: DFS tracking the current path as a list, add to result at leaves

problems.title: Binary Tree Maximum Path Sum
problems.teaches: At each node: choose to extend one branch OR be the peak of a path — two decisions

problems.title: Lowest Common Ancestor of a Binary Tree
problems.teaches: DFS where left and right returning non-null simultaneously means found LCA here

problems.title: Construct Binary Tree from Preorder and Inorder Traversal
problems.teaches: Inverse of traversal: preorder gives root, inorder tells you where left/right split

coreLesson: Explore all possibilities by building a choice, recurring, then undoing (backtrack).

problems.title: Fibonacci Number
problems.teaches: Call stack, base case, overlapping calls — intro to recursion before backtracking

problems.title: Check if Array Is Sorted
problems.teaches: Tail recursion: is the rest of the array sorted? — reduces to smaller subproblem

problems.title: Letter Combinations of a Phone Number
problems.teaches: Explore all combinations: one choice per digit, build result character by character

problems.title: Generate Parentheses
problems.teaches: Constrained exploration: only add ( if open < n, only add ) if close < open

problems.title: Permutations
problems.teaches: Explore all orderings: use visited[] to avoid reusing, undo after each branch

problems.title: Combination Sum
problems.teaches: Unbounded choices: you can reuse elements — recur with same index, not index+1

problems.title: Palindrome Partitioning
problems.teaches: Explore all string splits, prune the branch early if current segment isn't a palindrome

coreLesson: Priority queue gives O(log n) access to the current max/min — use it when you need the best element repeatedly.

problems.title: Kth Largest Element in an Array
problems.teaches: Basic max-heap: push all, pop K times — or min-heap of size K

problems.title: K Closest Points to Origin
problems.teaches: Max-heap of size K: maintain K closest by popping the furthest when over K

problems.title: Top K Frequent Words
problems.teaches: Heap with custom comparator: sort by frequency then alphabetically — heap ordering

problems.title: Merge K Sorted Lists
problems.teaches: Min-heap as a pointer: track (value, list_idx, elem_idx) — always extend the smallest

problems.title: Last Stone Weight
problems.teaches: Max-heap for greedy: always smash the two heaviest

problems.title: Reorganize String
problems.teaches: Max-heap + greedy: always pick the most frequent remaining character that isn't last used

problems.title: Task Scheduler
problems.teaches: Greedy + heap: most frequent tasks first, cooldown period handled with a queue

problems.title: Find Median from Data Stream
problems.teaches: Two heaps: max-heap for lower half, min-heap for upper half — median is always at the boundary

problems.title: Sliding Window Median
problems.teaches: Q8 inside a sliding window — add new element, remove expired element, maintain balance

coreLesson: Graph traversal generalizes tree traversal — but graphs have cycles, multiple components, and weights.

problems.title: Number of Islands
problems.teaches: DFS flood-fill on a grid — the graph is implicit (no adjacency list needed)

problems.title: Number of Provinces
problems.teaches: DFS on adjacency matrix — explicit graph, count connected components

problems.title: Rotting Oranges
problems.teaches: Multi-source BFS: multiple starting nodes simultaneously — teaches simultaneous spread

problems.title: Cycle Detection in Undirected Graph
problems.teaches: DFS with parent tracking: if you visit a neighbor that isn't your parent, cycle exists

problems.title: Course Schedule (Cycle in Directed Graph)
problems.teaches: DFS with in-stack tracking: visited vs in_recursion_stack — directed changes everything

problems.title: Course Schedule II (Topological Sort)
problems.teaches: BFS (Kahn's): nodes with 0 in-degree go first — requires Q5 understanding

problems.title: Is Graph Bipartite?
problems.teaches: 2-coloring with BFS: if a neighbor has the same color, not bipartite

problems.title: Network Delay Time
problems.teaches: Dijkstra's basic: min-heap + dist array — shortest path with weights

problems.title: Path With Minimum Effort
problems.teaches: Dijkstra's variant: minimize maximum edge — different cost function, same algorithm

problems.title: Cheapest Flights Within K Stops
problems.teaches: Bellman-Ford with K relaxations — Dijkstra's doesn't work with hop constraints

problems.title: Word Ladder
problems.teaches: BFS on implicit graph: each word transformation is an edge — graph is built on the fly

problems.title: Swim in Rising Water
problems.teaches: Dijkstra's / binary search on time — synthesis of Binary Search + Graphs

coreLesson: Overlapping subproblems + optimal substructure → cache intermediate results, build bottom-up.

problems.title: Fibonacci Number
problems.teaches: Recursion → memoization → tabulation — the full DP evolution in one problem

problems.title: Climbing Stairs
problems.teaches: Choices at each step → count paths — canonical 1D DP

problems.title: House Robber
problems.teaches: Decision affects future state: dp[i] = max(dp[i-1], dp[i-2] + nums[i])

problems.title: Decode Ways
problems.teaches: DP with conditional transitions — state depends on 1 OR 2 previous cells based on validity

problems.title: Coin Change
problems.teaches: Minimum DP with unbounded choices: dp[i] = min(dp[i], dp[i-coin] + 1)

problems.title: Longest Increasing Subsequence
problems.teaches: Flexible lookback: dp[i] = max(dp[j]+1 for all j < i where nums[j] < nums[i]) — not just 1 or 2 back

problems.title: Partition Equal Subset Sum
problems.teaches: 2D DP intro: dp[i][w] = can we form sum w using first i items? — include/exclude decision

problems.title: 0/1 Knapsack
problems.teaches: Extends Q7: each item has weight AND value — maximize value, same 2D structure

problems.title: Longest Common Subsequence
problems.teaches: 2D DP on two sequences: grid where dp[i][j] = LCS of first-i and first-j characters

problems.title: Edit Distance
problems.teaches: 3-operation 2D DP: delete, insert, replace — full command of 2D DP required
